---
title: "The Rev. William Sewell"
---

## The Rev. William Sewell

**Dates:** (23 Jan 1804-14 Nov 1874)

### Description

brother of Elizabeth Sewell, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1872)

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 26th 1874
- Letter from July 1st [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
